title: ShapeMemoryOptions
description: Options for configuring memory on a flexible shape

minInGBs.description: The minimum amount of memory, in GB

maxInGBs.description: The maximum amount of memory, in GB

defaultPerOcpuInGBs.description: The default amount of memory per OCPU, in GB

minPerOcpuInGBs.description: The minimum amount of memory per OCPU, in GB

maxPerOcpuInGBs.description: The maximum amount of memory per OCPU, in GB
